title: ee.mesh.auto_enrollment_summary.v1
description: Forensic audit-row payload emitted by SRR6.46.5 before any durable auto-enrollment write. Always emitted (even on dry-run and on already-complete paths) so the audit log records every attempted enrollment.

tailnetDisplayName.description: Optional, human-friendly tailnet name. Redacted under the tailscale_metadata redaction class for support bundles.

intendedLanePolicy.description: Default-deny conservative lane policy emitted by SRR6.46.3. Lanes not listed are interpreted as deny.

previousPeerGroupId.description: Set when this summary overwrites a prior materialization.

previousPeerSetHash.description: blake3 hash of the prior materialization's peer-set + lane policy.

intendedPeerSetHash.description: blake3 of sorted peer-id list joined with the canonical-JSON lane policy.

reversalCommand.description: Literal shell command the user can copy-paste to undo this materialization. Always references the absolute workspace path.

summaryHash.description: blake3 of the canonical-JSON serialization of the entire summary struct (excluding this field itself). Used for forensic correlation across audit chains, handoff capsules, support bundles.

materializationOutcome.description: Back-filled by SRR6.46.3 on the same audit row to record what actually happened. 'pending' is the initial value at emit time; subsequent updates patch the audit row's details JSON.

tailnetId.description: Stable Tailnet identifier (NOT the display name). Redacted under the tailscale_metadata redaction class for support bundles.

nodeKey.description: Stable tailscale node identifier. Redacted under the tailscale_metadata class.

tailscaleIp.description: 100.x.y.z address. Redacted under the tailscale_metadata class.

magicDnsName.description: MagicDNS hostname when available. Redacted under the tailscale_metadata class.

hostname.description: Operating system hostname as reported by tailscale status. Redacted under tailscale_metadata.

eeProtocolVersion.description: Semver of the ee.mesh.hello.v1 protocol version the peer reports.

discoveryPolicyDecision.description: Which SRR6.46.7 policy mode admitted this peer.
